name: Eggplant Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the eggplant into 1/4" slices.
2. Beat the eggs with a dash of salt.
3. Heat oil in a pan until hot but not smoking.
4. Dip each slice of eggplant into the beaten eggs, then coat with breadcrumbs.
5. Fry the coated eggplant slices until golden brown. Drain well.
6. Place sauce enough to cover the bottom of an ovenproof dish (8x14 or larger).
7. Make layers by placing a layer of eggplant in the sauce and turning to coat both sides.
8. Add more sauce, then dabs of ricotta cheese, and slices of mozzarella.
9. Dip each additional slice of eggplant into the remaining sauce to coat.
10. Continue layering until you have about three layers total.
11. Top with extra sauce and grated cheese.
12. Cover the dish and bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30 minutes, uncovered.
13. Partially cover the dish with foil and continue baking for another 20-25 minutes.
14. Remove from the oven and let rest for 15 minutes before serving.
15. Serve with crusty bread and a salad.
